connectivity_tips.tip: There are 2 main providers- Vini and Vodafone. Vini sim is recommended as they have the best 4G/5G mobile data network across all the islands
connectivity_tips._source_file: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Best place to buy a prepaid sim card is in the airport on arrival. At the Relay store, you will find the Vini sim cards and there is also a Vodafone store
connectivity_tips._source_file: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: You can also purchase an e-sim like Holafly or Airalo if you want international roaming but without a physical sim
connectivity_tips._source_file: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: The Airport in Papeete does not offer free WiFi
connectivity_tips._source_file: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf
